Name: adaptive_retry_budget
Title: Difficulty-Aware Retry Budgeting for Tool-Calling Agents
Experiment: Scale retry_budget by estimated task difficulty inside experiment.py and compare success_rate vs mean_latency.

Name: context_aware_precision
Title: Context Window Aware Tool Precision Calibration
Experiment: Couple tool_precision to context_window so longer contexts reduce hallucinated tool args; measure success_rate improvements.
